query: What should we improve next in this repository? Survey the evidence and give me a prioritized engineering roadmap.
Regenerate specs/INDEX.md from the actual spec directories and surface anything blocked or awaiting a decision.
Review our active checklists and recent code history, then recommend the highest-value next engineering investment.
We finished the current milestone. Build a small evidence-backed backlog and let me choose what runs next.
Continue the saved improvement survey; I select proposal P3 for decomposition.
Prioritize the repository's security, reliability, and developer-experience opportunities without implementing them yet.
Implement specs/014-bulk-tagging/spec.md with tests and docs.
The upload endpoint returns 500 for empty files. Reproduce and fix the bug.
I want some kind of sharing feature, but permissions and expiry are undecided.
Review PR #42 and tell me whether its tests cover the edge cases.
Set up a new React and FastAPI project from scratch.
Rename getUser to fetchUser and update imports; skip the workflow.
Create a five-year marketing roadmap for my restaurant.
Explain the current architecture to me without proposing changes.
Run the existing test suite and report the failures; do not prioritize work.
